name: Bishop Chessmon (White)

signature_move.name: Bishop Laser
signature_move.description: Fires a long ray of light from its staff.

description: A Puppet Digimon that freely uses technical arts. The reach of its attacks is very wide, so it can strike at long-range enemies. Its catchphrase is, "Oh Lord, give me strength!" Its Special Moves are a long ray of light fired from its staff ( Bishop Laser ), and annihilating the opponent with a cruciform magic circle ( Bishop Cross ). Also, it can freely wield its staff in close combat, bewitching the opponent ( Magical Stick ).
